Name: if
Description: Conditional statement; Executes code block if condition is true; Returns Boolean decision result

Name: else
Description: Else block; Executes code if preceding if condition is false; Always paired with if

Name: else if
Description: Else if block; Tests additional condition if previous if was false; Allows multiple conditions

Name: switch
Description: Switch statement; Tests expression against multiple cases; More efficient than if-else chain

Name: case
Description: Case label in switch; Matches value against switch expression; Execution continues to next case if no break

Name: default
Description: Default case in switch; Executes if no other cases match; Optional but recommended

Name: break
Description: Break statement; Terminates loop or switch execution; Transfers control to statement after loop/switch

Name: for
Description: For loop; Iterates fixed number of times; Takes init, condition, increment; Best for counting loops

Name: foreach
Description: Foreach loop; Iterates over collection elements; Cleaner syntax than for loop for collections; Each iteration gets one element

Name: continue
Description: Continue statement; Skips current iteration; Continues with next iteration of loop; Ignores remaining code in current iteration

Name: return
Description: Return statement; Exits function immediately; Returns value to caller; Optional value if void function

Name: throw
Description: Throw statement; Throws exception; Transfers control to exception handler; Used for error handling

Name: SELECT
Description: SELECT statement; Retrieves data from one or more tables; Returns result set; Foundation of all queries

Name: FROM
Description: FROM clause; Specifies table(s) to query; Required in SELECT; Can include table joins

Name: WHERE
Description: WHERE clause; Filters rows based on conditions; Optional; Returns matching records only

Name: JOIN
Description: JOIN clause; Combines rows from multiple tables; Uses relationship keys; Returns matched records

Name: INNER JOIN
Description: INNER JOIN; Returns only matching records from both tables; Default JOIN type; Excludes unmatched rows

Name: LEFT JOIN
Description: LEFT JOIN; Returns all rows from left table plus matching from right; Includes unmatched left records with NULL

Name: GROUP BY
Description: GROUP BY clause; Groups rows by column values; Used with aggregate functions; Summarizes data

Name: HAVING
Description: HAVING clause; Filters grouped data; Works with GROUP BY; Like WHERE but for groups

Name: ORDER BY
Description: ORDER BY clause; Sorts result set; ASC (ascending) or DESC (descending); Affects result presentation

Name: LIMIT
Description: LIMIT clause; Restricts number of returned rows; Useful for pagination; Improves performance

Name: OFFSET
Description: OFFSET clause; Skips specified number of rows; Used with LIMIT for pagination; Enables paging

Name: INSERT
Description: INSERT statement; Adds new rows to table; Specifies columns and values; Creates new records

Name: UPDATE
Description: UPDATE statement; Modifies existing rows; Always use WHERE to target specific rows; Changes data values

Name: DELETE
Description: DELETE statement; Removes rows from table; Always use WHERE; Deletes data permanently

Name: CREATE TABLE
Description: CREATE TABLE statement; Creates new table; Defines columns and data types; Establishes structure

Name: ALTER TABLE
Description: ALTER TABLE statement; Modifies table structure; Adds/removes/changes columns; Changes constraints

Name: DROP TABLE
Description: DROP TABLE statement; Deletes entire table; Removes structure and data; Irreversible operation

Name: COUNT
Description: COUNT function; Counts number of rows; Returns integer; Ignores NULL values

Name: SUM
Description: SUM function; Sums numeric values; Returns total; Useful for financial calculations

Name: AVG
Description: AVG function; Calculates average; Returns decimal; Useful for analysis

Name: MIN
Description: MIN function; Returns smallest value; Useful for range analysis; Works with numbers and dates

Name: MAX
Description: MAX function; Returns largest value; Useful for range analysis; Works with numbers and dates

Name: AND
Description: AND operator; All conditions must be true; Narrows result set; Used in WHERE clause

Name: OR
Description: OR operator; At least one condition true; Broadens result set; Used in WHERE clause

Name: NOT
Description: NOT operator; Reverses condition logic; Returns opposite results; Used with other operators

Name: IN
Description: IN operator; Matches any value in list; Shorthand for multiple OR; Useful for filtering

Name: BETWEEN
Description: BETWEEN operator; Matches values within range; Inclusive on both ends; Useful for date/number ranges

Name: LIKE
Description: LIKE operator; Pattern matching on text; Uses % (wildcard) and _ (single char); Case-insensitive

Name: IS NULL
Description: IS NULL operator; Checks for NULL values; Not equal to empty string; Used for missing data

Name: IS NOT NULL
Description: IS NOT NULL operator; Checks for non-NULL values; Opposite of IS NULL; Filters out missing data

Name: DISTINCT
Description: DISTINCT keyword; Returns unique values only; Removes duplicates; Reduces result set size

Name: UNION
Description: UNION operator; Combines results from multiple queries; Removes duplicates; Columns must match

Name: SUBQUERY
Description: SUBQUERY; Query within query; Inner query executes first; Result used by outer query

Name: EXISTS
Description: EXISTS operator; Checks if subquery returns any rows; Returns TRUE/FALSE; Used with WHERE

Name: CASE
Description: CASE statement; Conditional logic in SQL; Returns different values based on conditions; Like IF-ELSE

Name: CAST
Description: CAST function; Converts data type; Changes column/value type; Useful for compatibility

Name: COMMIT
Description: COMMIT statement; Saves all changes permanently; Ends transaction; Changes are irreversible

Name: ROLLBACK
Description: ROLLBACK statement; Undoes all changes in transaction; Reverts to previous state; Restores data

Name: BEGIN TRANSACTION
Description: BEGIN TRANSACTION; Starts new transaction; Groups multiple SQL statements; Enables atomicity

Name: PRIMARY KEY
Description: PRIMARY KEY constraint; Uniquely identifies each row; Not NULL; Only one per table

Name: FOREIGN KEY
Description: FOREIGN KEY constraint; Links to another table; Maintains referential integrity; Enforces relationships

Name: UNIQUE
Description: UNIQUE constraint; Ensures all values are unique; Allows NULL; Prevents duplicates

Name: INDEX
Description: INDEX; Creates searchable index; Speeds up queries; Slows down INSERT/UPDATE; Improves performance

Name: RIGHT JOIN
Description: RIGHT JOIN; Returns all rows from right table plus matching from left; Opposite of LEFT JOIN

Name: CROSS JOIN
Description: CROSS JOIN; Cartesian product; Returns all combinations; No ON condition needed

Name: HAVING COUNT
Description: HAVING with COUNT; Filters groups by count condition; Common aggregate filtering; Used with GROUP BY

Name: LIKE PATTERN
Description: LIKE pattern matching; Wildcard '%' matches any chars; Wildcard '_' matches single char; Text search

Name: BuildingManagementSystem
Description: Root group for Building Management System covering Hotels, Rentals, PGs, Schools, etc.

Name: Property_Master
Description: Core property information and master data

Name: Property_Location
Description: Property address, GPS coordinates, and geographic details

Name: Property_Ownership
Description: Property owner details and ownership percentages for co-owned properties

Name: Property_ContactInfo
Description: Property emergency contacts and stakeholder contact details

Name: Property_BankDetails
Description: Bank account details for property rental income deposits

Name: Property_Floors
Description: Floor information and structure within property

Name: Property_UnitTypes
Description: Classification of unit types (1BHK, 2BHK, Shop, Office, etc.)

Name: Property_UnitStatus
Description: Current status of each unit (Available, Occupied, Maintenance, Blocked)

Name: Property_UnitAmenities
Description: Amenities mapping for individual units (WiFi, AC, Parking, etc.)

Name: Property_Measurements
Description: Property and unit area measurements (Total, Built-up, Carpet area)

Name: Property_StructureDetails
Description: Structural and construction details (Age, Material, Floors, Construction Type)

Name: Property_Amenities
Description: Common amenities available at property level (Gym, Pool, Parking, Security)

Name: Property_Licenses
Description: Government licenses and permits for the property

Name: Property_Certifications
Description: Building certifications (Fire Safety, Occupancy, Structural, Environmental)

Name: Property_Registration
Description: Property registration details with government authorities

Name: Property_TaxInfo
Description: Property tax identification and annual tax details

Name: Property_OccupancyHistory
Description: Historical occupancy records for reporting and analysis

Name: Property_Inspection
Description: Property and unit inspection records and reports

Name: Property_Inventory
Description: Furnishings and items inventory for furnished units

Name: Property_Policies
Description: Building policies and rules for tenants

Name: Property_NearbyFacilities
Description: Nearby facilities and attractions for marketing

Name: Property_Zones
Description: Zoning information and land use classification

Name: Property_Media
Description: Property photos, videos, and media files

Name: Property_Pricing
Description: Rent rates and pricing information for units

Name: Property_Expenses
Description: Property operating expenses (Maintenance, Security, Cleaning, etc.)

Name: Property_Revenue
Description: Property rental income and revenue tracking

Name: Property_Staff
Description: Property management staff and caretaker details

Name: Property_Vendors
Description: Vendor and contractor information for maintenance

Name: Property_Documents
Description: Property related documents storage and indexing

Name: Property_Compliance
Description: Compliance with regulations and legal requirements

Name: Property_Incidents
Description: Incident and accident reporting for properties

Name: Property_Security
Description: Security systems and access control tracking

Name: Property_TransactionLog
Description: Audit log for all property management transactions

Name: ProjectPlanningSystem
Description: Root group for Project Planning System covering all aspects of project management

Name: Project Initialization
Description: Project charter, business case, and initialization

Name: Scope Management
Description: Project scope definition, WBS, and requirements

Name: Schedule Management
Description: Timeline, milestones, task scheduling, and dependencies

Name: Resource Management
Description: Team, equipment, materials, and resource allocation

Name: Cost Management
Description: Budget, cost estimation, expense tracking, and financial control

Name: Quality Management
Description: Quality standards, testing, inspections, and assurance

Name: Risk Management
Description: Risk identification, assessment, mitigation, and monitoring

Name: Change Management
Description: Change requests, impact analysis, and version control

Name: Document Management
Description: Project documentation, templates, and knowledge base

Name: Reporting & Analytics
Description: Dashboards, reports, KPIs, and project analytics

Name: Project_Charter
Description: Project charter with objectives, justification, and authorization

Name: Business_Case
Description: Business case with ROI, benefits, and feasibility analysis

Name: Scope_Baseline
Description: Approved scope baseline for change control

Name: Tasks
Description: Individual tasks with start/end dates, duration, effort

Name: Task_Dependencies
Description: Task dependencies (FS, SS, FF, SF) and relationships

Name: Schedule_Baseline
Description: Approved schedule baseline for variance tracking

Name: Task_Progress
Description: Task completion percentage and status updates

Name: Team_Members
Description: Project team members with roles and responsibilities

Name: Resource_Allocation
Description: Resource assignments to tasks and projects

Name: Resource_Capacity
Description: Resource capacity planning and utilization tracking

Name: Project_Budget
Description: Overall project budget and cost breakdown

Name: Cost_Estimation
Description: Cost estimates for activities and resources

Name: Cost_Baseline
Description: Approved cost baseline for variance analysis

Name: Earned_Value_Management
Description: EVM metrics (PV, EV, AC, CPI, SPI)

Name: Risk_Response
Description: Risk response strategies and action plans

Name: Id
Purpose: Uniquely identifies each project across the entire system to ensure referential integrity

Name: ProjectCode
Purpose: Provides a business-friendly identifier for project tracking, reporting, and communication

Name: ProjectName
Purpose: Defines the project identity for stakeholder communication and documentation

Name: ProjectDescription
Purpose: Provides comprehensive overview to ensure stakeholder alignment on project scope and objectives

Name: ProjectType
Purpose: Classifies projects for resource allocation, reporting, and methodology application

Name: ProjectPriority
Purpose: Guides resource allocation decisions and stakeholder attention during conflicts

Name: ProjectStatus
Purpose: Tracks project lifecycle stage for governance reporting and automated workflow triggers

Name: ProjectManagerId
Purpose: Establishes accountability by assigning single point of responsibility for project success

Name: SponsorId
Purpose: Links project to executive leadership for funding approval and strategic alignment

Name: StartDate
Purpose: Establishes timeline baseline for resource planning and dependency management

Name: EndDate
Purpose: Defines delivery commitment for stakeholder expectations and resource release planning

Name: TotalBudget
Purpose: Sets financial boundary for cost control and variance monitoring

Name: ActualCost
Purpose: Tracks spending for earned value analysis and profitability calculations

Name: PercentComplete
Purpose: Communicates progress to stakeholders and triggers milestone-based workflows

Name: CreatedBy
Description: User who created the project record
Purpose: Establishes data ownership for compliance and accountability tracking

Name: CreatedDate
Purpose: Provides temporal context for data lifecycle management and audit trails

Name: UpdatedBy
Description: User who last updated the project
Purpose: Tracks modification responsibility for change management and dispute resolution

Name: UpdatedDate
Purpose: Enables delta synchronization and tracks data freshness for reporting

Name: Id
Purpose: Uniquely identifies each charter to maintain document integrity and versioning

Name: ProjectId
Purpose: Links charter to its project for hierarchical navigation and data integrity

Name: CharterTitle
Description: Official title of the charter document
Purpose: Identifies the authorization document for formal communication and archival

Name: ProjectPurpose
Purpose: Documents why the project exists to ensure strategic alignment and stakeholder buy-in

Name: ProjectObjectives
Purpose: Defines success criteria to enable objective performance evaluation at project closure

Name: HighLevelRequirements
Purpose: Establishes baseline scope understanding for initial planning and stakeholder agreement

Name: ProjectManagerAssigned
Purpose: Formally delegates authority and establishes accountability for project execution

Name: AuthorizedBy
Purpose: Documents executive approval for compliance and escalation chain of command

Name: AuthorizedDate
Purpose: Marks official project start for contractual obligations and audit purposes

Name: CharterStatus
Purpose: Tracks approval workflow state to control project initiation process

Name: CreatedBy
Purpose: Establishes document authorship for accountability and version control

Name: CreatedDate
Purpose: Records document origin for compliance and timeline reconstruction

Name: UpdatedBy
Description: User who last modified the charter
Purpose: Tracks latest editor for change control and dispute resolution

Name: UpdatedDate
Purpose: Indicates document currency for approval workflow and review cycles

Name: Id
Purpose: Uniquely identifies each business case for investment tracking and portfolio analysis

Name: ProjectId
Purpose: Links financial justification to project for traceability and benefits realization tracking

Name: BusinessCaseTitle
Purpose: Identifies the investment proposal for executive review and approval routing

Name: ExecutiveSummary
Purpose: Enables quick decision-making by summarizing key investment merits

Name: ProblemStatement
Purpose: Articulates the pain point to validate project necessity and measure impact

Name: ProposedSolution
Purpose: Describes how the problem will be solved to enable feasibility assessment

Name: EstimatedCost
Purpose: Quantifies investment required for ROI calculation and budget approval

Name: EstimatedBenefits
Purpose: Measures expected value creation for investment prioritization

Name: ROI
Purpose: Enables comparison across portfolio for capital allocation decisions

Name: NPV
Purpose: Accounts for time value of money in long-term investment decisions

Name: PaybackPeriod
Purpose: Indicates how quickly investment will be recovered for cash flow planning

Name: ApprovalStatus
Purpose: Controls project funding release through approval workflow gates

Name: CreatedBy
Purpose: Identifies proposal author for follow-up questions and accountability

Name: CreatedDate
Purpose: Records proposal submission for approval cycle timing and archival

Name: UpdatedBy
Purpose: Tracks revision responsibility for change control and approval resets

Name: UpdatedDate
Purpose: Indicates document currency for review cycles and reapproval triggers

Name: Id
Purpose: Uniquely identifies each goal for tracking and benefits realization measurement

Name: ProjectId
Purpose: Associates goals with project for success evaluation and reporting

Name: GoalTitle
Purpose: Provides recognizable label for dashboard display and stakeholder communication

Name: GoalDescription
Purpose: Clarifies intent to ensure common understanding across stakeholders

Name: MeasurementCriteria
Purpose: Defines quantifiable metrics to enable objective achievement assessment
